title: Helicopter Crash Near Major Saudi Oil Refinery Kills 14 People
summary_full: The incident occurred near the Ras Tanura facility in the east of the country, a key export hub for oil transported through the Strait of Hormuz.
summary_public: The incident occurred near the Ras Tanura facility in the east of the country, a key export hub for oil transported through the Strait of Hormuz.
